markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If San Diego and Los Angeles D go to extra innings in the San Diego vs Los Angeles D professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 5, 2026 at 7:20 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.title: Will there be extra innings in the San Diego vs Los Angeles D game originally scheduled for Jul 5, 2026 at 7:20 PM EDT?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If San Diego wins the San Diego vs Los Angeles D professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 5, 2026 at 7:20 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the San Diego vs Los Angeles D professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 5, 2026 at 7:20 PM EDT. If this game is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled game has finished (within two days). If the game is cancelled or rescheduled to over two days away, the market will resolve to a fair price in accordance with the rules.
markets.title: San Diego vs Los Angeles D Winner?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Renato Veiga records at least 1 assist during the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Portugal vs Croatia professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 2, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Portugal vs Croatia professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 2, 2026. If a player is active but never enters the game, the market settles to the last fair market price before game start. Once a player enters the game, the market settles based on the player's assists recorded.
markets.title: Renato Veiga: 1+ assists?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Vitinha records the first goal during the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Portugal vs Croatia professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 2, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Portugal vs Croatia professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 2, 2026. If a player is active but never enters the game, the market settles to the last fair market price before game start. Once a player enters the game, the market settles based on the player's goals scored. If the first goal of the match is an own goal, the market will resolve based on the next non-own-goal scored.
markets.title: Vitinha: First Goalscorer
